barRaise.topFinding: HBH committed to a native 2D-to-3D rework this cycle (decision doc 2026-05-29), which is well-reasoned and finally breaks the six-cycle multimesh deadlock by collapsing the dual enemy path into one pooled 3D path. The execution risk is the problem: the whole arc (v0.81-v0.84, 32 dirty files plus the untracked 629-LOC source/world3d/) is uncommitted while the GDD pill reads v0.84.0 and project.godot reads 0.80.3, the exact stacked-uncommitted pattern the commit-per-patch rule exists to prevent after the May 2026 FUSE-truncation loss. The two rename-era correctness bugs (fog_of_war.gd:484-494 wrong vision; save_load.gd no save_version) are still live in the shipped 2D path, CLAUDE.md still frames the project as 2D-only, and the only live play entry is the 3D sandbox spike, so there is no playable game loop right now. Commit and release the arc in slices today, update the primer to the 3D direction, then resume phased work.
